title: TRIUMPH-1 Phase 3 topline results
study_design: phase 3 randomised placebo-controlled master-protocol trial; sponsor topline disclosure
journal_or_registry: Eli Lilly and Company investor release
population: adults with obesity or overweight and at least one weight-related comorbidity, without diabetes
duration: 80 weeks; prespecified extension to 104 weeks for a severe-obesity subgroup
key_results: Sponsor-reported efficacy-estimand mean weight change at 80 weeks was -28.3% at 12 mg versus -2.2% with placebo.
Sponsor-reported 45.3% of participants at 12 mg achieved at least 30% weight reduction at 80 weeks.
The severe-obesity extension reported -30.3% mean weight change at 104 weeks at 12 mg.
safety_findings: Full peer-reviewed safety tables were not available in the topline release.
limitations: Sponsor topline communication; not a substitute for peer-reviewed full publication or regulator assessment.

provenance.verification_method: official sponsor release and NCT cross-check

investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational and is not approved for public use.
